subject: math
activity_templates: A 2nd-grade two-digit addition worksheet. 8 problems arranged in two columns (e.g. '34 + 25 = __'), stacked vertically with space for regrouping work. Header reads 'Double-Digit Addition'. {{character}} gives a thumbs up.

A 2nd-grade addition word-problem worksheet with 4 short kid-friendly word problems involving two-digit numbers. Each problem has a labeled workspace and an answer box. {{character}} reads the first problem.
A 2-digit addition-with-regrouping worksheet. 6 problems in column form, each with a tens and ones column clearly divided. A tens/ones hint chart at the top. {{character}} points to the hint chart.
A mixed 2-digit + 1-digit addition practice worksheet. 10 problems in a 2x5 grid in stacked column form with clear workspace. {{character}} waves at the top.
